channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump boils over after Tehran kept him waiting
item.description: The trigger for President Trump's strikes on Iran was the downing of a U.S. helicopter, but behind the scenes Trump had been growing more and more fru...

item.title: Trump says U.S. will bomb Iran today: 'They keep playing us for suckers'
item.description: President Trump told reporters the U.S. would strike Iran again on Wednesday, following Tuesday evening's attacks.

item.title: How the Iran war aftershocks are hitting oil, coal, climate
item.description: Data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration shows the ongoing impact of the Iran war on energy markets and climate.

item.title: Supreme Court's final cases loom over Trump's immigration, election hopes
item.description: The last decisions of the term include major tests of presidential power and election law with lasting implications for voting.
